title: eurya angulosa
intro: Eurya angulosa, also known as the angled eurya, is a plant species native to tropical Asia, belonging to the family Pentaphyllaceae. The plant has been utilized in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Eurya angulosa include its potential to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, as well as its use as a diuretic and to reduce blood pressure. Eurya angulosa can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being made into poultices and ointments for topical application.
